      have h_ortho : ∀ᵐ ω ∂P, ⟪X i ω, X j ω - X i ω⟫ = 0 := by
        apply h_mart.orthogonal_diff hij
      have h_nonneg : 0 ≤ ∫⁻ ω, ‖X j ω - X i ω‖ ^ 2 ∂P := by positivity
      calc
        ∫⁻ ω, ‖X i ω + (X j ω - X i ω)‖ ^ 2 ∂P
          = ∫⁻ ω, ‖X i ω‖ ^ 2 + 2 * ⟪X i ω, X j ω - X i ω⟫ + ‖X j ω - X i ω‖ ^ 2 ∂P := by
            simp [norm_add_sq, inner_add_left, inner_add_right, mul_add, add_mul]
        _ = ∫⁻ ω, ‖X i ω‖ ^ 2 ∂P + ∫⁻ ω, ‖X j ω - X i ω‖ ^ 2 ∂P := by
            simp [lintegral_add, lintegral_const_mul, h_ortho, h_nonneg]
        _ ≥ ∫⁻ ω, ‖X i ω‖ ^ 2 ∂P := by simp [le_add_iff_nonneg_right, h_nonneg]

refine ⟨fun i ↦ ?_, fun i j hij ↦ ?_⟩
  · have h_meas := (hX.martingale.adapted i).mono (𝓕.le i)
    exact h_meas.norm.pow 2
  · have h_mart : ∀ k, MartingaleAt X 𝓕 P k := hX.martingale.martingaleAt
    have h_cond : ∀ k l, k ≤ l → ENNReal.ofReal (∫ ω, X l ω ∂(P | 𝓕 k)) = ENNReal.ofReal (X k) := by
      intro k l hkl
      exact congr_arg ENNReal.ofReal (h_mart l k hkl)
    calc
      ∫ ω, ‖X j ω‖ ^ 2 ∂(P | 𝓕 i)
        = ∫ ω, ‖X i ω + (X j ω - X i ω)‖ ^ 2 ∂(P | 𝓕 i) := by
          refine SetIntegral.congr_ae (by simp) ?_
          exact eventually_of_forall fun ω ↦ by simp [add_sub_cancel]
      _ ≥ ∫ ω, ‖X i ω‖ ^ 2 ∂(P | 𝓕 i) := by
          apply SetIntegral.mono_set_ae
          · exact Filter.eventually_of_forall fun ω ↦ by
              nlinarith [norm_add_le (X i ω) (X j ω - X i ω), sq_nonneg ‖X j ω - X i ω‖]
          · exact Measure.restrict_ae_neBot (by simp)
      _ = ‖X i‖ ^ 2 := by
          simp [SetIntegral.const']

have h_mart : Martingale X 𝓕 P := hX.martingale
  have h_int : ∀ i, Integrable (fun ω ↦ ‖X i ω‖ ^ 2) P := fun i ↦ hX.integrable_sq i
  refine ⟨fun i ↦ (hX.martingale.adapted i).norm.pow 2 |>.mono (𝓕.le i),
    fun i j hij ω ↦ ?_⟩
  have h_cond : ∀ᵐ ω ∂P, ENNReal.toReal (∫⁻ x, ‖X j x‖ ^ 2 ∂(P.restrict (𝓕 i ω))) ≥ ‖X i ω‖ ^ 2 := by
    have h_mart_cond : ∀ᵐ ω ∂P, ∫ x in 𝓕 i ω, X j x ∂P = X i ω := h_mart.condexp_eq hij
    have h_var : ∀ᵐ ω ∂P, ∫ x in 𝓕 i ω, ‖X j x‖ ^ 2 ∂P ≥ ‖X i ω‖ ^ 2 := by
      filter_upwards [h_mart_cond] with ω hω
      calc
        ∫ x in 𝓕 i ω, ‖X j x‖ ^ 2 ∂P
          = ∫ x in 𝓕 i ω, ‖X j x - X i ω + X i ω‖ ^ 2 ∂P := by simp [hω]
        _ ≥ ∫ x in 𝓕 i ω, ‖X i ω‖ ^ 2 ∂P := by
          apply setIntegral_mono_ae
          · exact eventually_of_forall fun _ ↦ norm_nonneg _
          · exact eventually_of_forall fun x ↦ by
              nlinarith [norm_add_le (X j x - X i ω) (X i ω), sq_nonneg (‖X j x - X i ω‖)]
        _ = ‖X i ω‖ ^ 2 := by simp [Set.indicator_const]
    exact h_var
  exact h_cond

have h_mart : Martingale X 𝓕 P := hX.martingale
  have h_cadlag : ∀ ω, IsCadlag (X · ω) := hX.cadlag
  have h_bounded : ⨆ i, eLpNorm (X i) 2 P < ∞ := hX.bounded
  refine ⟨?_, ?_, ?_⟩
  · intro i
    exact hX.integrable_sq i
  · intro i
    exact (h_mart.adapted i).norm_rpow 2
  · intro i j hij ω
    have h_cond : ENNReal.ofReal (∫ x, ‖X j x‖ ^ 2 ∂P) ≥ ENNReal.ofReal (∫ x, ‖X i x‖ ^ 2 ∂P) := by
      have h_mart_prop := h_mart.conditional_expectation_eq i j hij
      calc
        ENNReal.ofReal (∫ x, ‖X j x‖ ^ 2 ∂P)
          = ENNReal.ofReal (∫ x, ‖(X j) x‖ ^ 2 ∂P) := rfl
        _ ≥ ENNReal.ofReal (∫ x, ‖(X i) x‖ ^ 2 ∂P) := by
          have h_jensen : ∫ x, ‖X i x‖ ^ 2 ∂P ≤ ∫ x, ‖X j x‖ ^ 2 ∂P := by
            apply norm_rpow_integral_le_of_martingale h_mart hij
          exact ENNReal.ofReal_le_ofReal h_jensen
    simp_all [ENNReal.ofReal_le_ofReal]

refine ⟨fun i ↦ ?_, fun i j hij ↦ ?_⟩
  · have h_meas := (hX.martingale.adapted i).mono (𝓕.le i)
    exact h_meas.norm.pow 2
  · have h_mart : Martingale X 𝓕 P := hX.martingale
    have h_cond : ∀ᵐ ω, ∫ x in 𝓕 i, X j x ∂P = X i ω := h_mart.condexp_eq hij
    have h_int : Integrable (X j) P := h_mart.integrable j
    calc
      ∫ x in 𝓕 i, ‖X j x‖ ^ 2 ∂P
        = ∫ x in 𝓕 i, ‖X i x + (X j x - X i x)‖ ^ 2 ∂P := by
          filter_upwards [h_cond] with ω
          simp [norm_add_sq_le]
      _ ≥ ∫ x in 𝓕 i, ‖X i x‖ ^ 2 ∂P := by
          apply condexp_mono
          · exact (hX.martingale.adapted i).mono (𝓕.le i) |>.norm.pow 2
          · exact (hX.martingale.adapted j).mono (𝓕.le j) |>.norm.pow 2
          · exact fun ω ↦ by
              nlinarith [sq_nonneg (‖X j ω‖ - ‖X i ω‖),
                norm_add_sq_le (X i ω) (X j ω - X i ω)]

refine ⟨fun i ↦ ?_, fun i j hij ↦ ?_⟩
  · have h_meas := (hX.martingale.adapted i).mono (𝓕.le i)
    exact (h_meas.norm _).pow 2
  · have h_mart : Martingale X 𝓕 P := hX.martingale
    have h_cond : ∀ᵐ ω, ∫ x in 𝓕 i, X j x ∂P = X i ω := h_mart.condexp_eq hij
    have h_int_sq : Integrable (fun ω ↦ ‖X j ω‖ ^ 2) P := hX.integrable_sq j
    calc
      ∫ x in 𝓕 i, ‖X j x‖ ^ 2 ∂P ≥ ‖∫ x in 𝓕 i, X j x ∂P‖ ^ 2 := by
        exact ENNReal.ofReal_le_ofReal (by
          apply norm_condexp_le_L2_pow
          exact h_int_sq.1
          exact (h_mart.adapted j).mono (le_trans (𝓕.le i) (𝓕.mono hij)))
      _ = ‖X i ω‖ ^ 2 := by
        filter_upwards [h_cond] with ω hω
        rw [hω]

have h_mart : Martingale X 𝓕 P := hX.martingale
  have h_cadlag : ∀ ω, IsCadlag (X · ω) := hX.cadlag
  have h_bounded : ⨆ i, eLpNorm (X i) 2 P < ∞ := hX.bounded
  refine submartingale_of_martingale_sq_norm h_mart ?_
  intro i
  exact hX.integrable_sq i

have h_mart : Martingale X 𝓕 P := hX.martingale
  have h_int : ∀ i, Integrable (fun ω ↦ ‖X i ω‖ ^ 2) P := fun i ↦ hX.integrable_sq i
  refine ⟨fun i ↦ (hX.martingale.adapted i).norm.pow 2 |>.mono (𝓕.le i),
    fun i j hij ω ↦ ?_⟩
  have h_cond : ∀ᵐ ω, ∫ x, X j x ∂(P.cond (𝓕 i)) = X i ω := h_mart.condexp_eq hij
  have h_sub : ∀ᵐ ω, ‖X i ω‖ ^ 2 ≤ ∫ x, ‖X j x‖ ^ 2 ∂(P.cond (𝓕 i)) := by
    filter_upwards [h_cond] with ω hω
    exact ENNReal.ofReal_le_ofReal (by
      simpa [← hω] using
        norm_condexp_le_Lp_pow (h_mart.adapted j).aestronglyMeasurable 2 (by simp) (by simp))
  exact h_sub
